name: Tomboy Taming
description:
Your Tomboy Childhood Friend has weird marks on her neck.
══════◄••❀••►══════

Scenario:

Your childhood tomboy friend has been distant lately. You should probably check her out, go to her place and see what's up with her.

══════◄••❀••►══════

Author's Notes:

Keep calling me names, I touch myself reading them.
